examples_json: [{"en":"I live in a dormitory near campus.","zh":"我住在校园附近的宿舍。"}]
[{"en":"Go to the reception desk to check in.","zh":"去前台办理入住。"}]
[{"en":"I need to check in at the dormitory.","zh":"我需要去宿舍办理入住。"}]
[{"en":"My booking is under the name Li.","zh":"我的预订姓名是李。"}]
[{"en":"Here is your room key for room 302.","zh":"这是你302房间的钥匙。"}]
[{"en":"Please show your student ID to register.","zh":"请出示学生证办理登记。"}]
[{"en":"What's the Wi-Fi password for the dorm?","zh":"宿舍的Wi-Fi密码是什么？"}]
[{"en":"The laundry room is on the first floor.","zh":"洗衣房在一楼。"}]
[{"en":"We have a shared kitchen on each floor.","zh":"每层楼都有一个共享厨房。"}]
[{"en":"Take the elevator to the third floor.","zh":"坐电梯到三楼。"}]

description: 入住前需要缴纳的押金，退宿时退还。
examples_json: [{"en":"You need to pay a deposit before moving in.","zh":"入住前需要交押金。"}]
[{"en":"Please sign the housing contract.","zh":"请签住宿合同。"}]
[{"en":"The utility bill is included in the rent.","zh":"水电费包含在租金里。"}]
[{"en":"Please call maintenance if the light is broken.","zh":"如果灯坏了请打电话报修。"}]
[{"en":"The air conditioner isn't working properly.","zh":"空调不太好用。"}]
[{"en":"Can I adjust the heater in my room?","zh":"我可以调节房间的暖气吗？"}]
[{"en":"There's a curfew at 11 PM in the dorm.","zh":"宿舍晚上11点宵禁。"}]
[{"en":"Do I need to bring my own bedding?","zh":"我需要自己带床上用品吗？"}]
[{"en":"Please fill out this registration form.","zh":"请填写这张登记表。"}]
[{"en":"The visitor policy allows guests until 10 PM.","zh":"访客政策允许客人待到晚上10点。"}]
[{"en":"Quiet hours start at 10 PM.","zh":"安静时间从晚上10点开始。"}]
[{"en":"I prefer a single room.","zh":"我更喜欢单人间。"}]
[{"en":"A shared room is cheaper than a single room.","zh":"双人间比单人间便宜。"}]
[{"en":"The landlord lives on the first floor.","zh":"房东住在一楼。"}]
[{"en":"Read the lease agreement carefully before signing.","zh":"签之前仔细阅读租赁协议。"}]
[{"en":"When can I move in?","zh":"我什么时候可以搬进来？"}]
[{"en":"You need to give notice before moving out.","zh":"搬出前需要提前通知。"}]
[{"en":"Don't ignore the fire alarm.","zh":"不要忽视火灾报警器。"}]
[{"en":"The emergency exit is at the end of the hall.","zh":"紧急出口在走廊尽头。"}]
[{"en":"All residents must sign in after 10 PM.","zh":"所有住户晚上10点后需登记。"}]
[{"en":"The common room has a TV and sofas.","zh":"公共休息室有电视和沙发。"}]
[{"en":"You need a laundry card to use the washing machine.","zh":"你需要洗衣卡才能用洗衣机。"}]
[{"en":"Put plastic bottles in the recycling bin.","zh":"把塑料瓶放进回收箱。"}]
[{"en":"Use your key card to enter the building.","zh":"用门禁卡进入大楼。"}]
[{"en":"The security guard is at the front gate.","zh":"保安在大门口。"}]
[{"en":"What's your room number?","zh":"你的房间号是多少？"}]
[{"en":"The floor plan shows where the exit is.","zh":"楼层平面图显示了出口位置。"}]
[{"en":"My neighbor is also a freshman.","zh":"我的邻居也是一年级新生。"}]
[{"en":"If you have a noise complaint, call reception.","zh":"如果有噪音投诉，打电话给前台。"}]
[{"en":"The accommodation office can help with housing issues.","zh":"住宿办公室可以帮忙解决住宿问题。"}]
[{"en":"Please show your passport at immigration.","zh":"请在入境处出示护照。"}]
[{"en":"My student visa is valid for two years.","zh":"我的学生签证有效期两年。"}]
[{"en":"You need to declare this at customs.","zh":"你需要在海关申报这个。"}]
[{"en":"Do you have anything to declare?","zh":"你有什么需要申报的吗？"}]
[{"en":"Please collect your luggage from carousel 3.","zh":"请到3号转盘取行李。"}]
[{"en":"Here is your boarding pass for flight BA168.","zh":"这是你BA168航班的登机牌。"}]
[{"en":"Go through immigration after you get off the plane.","zh":"下飞机后通过入境检查。"}]
[{"en":"What is the purpose of your visit?","zh":"你来访的目的是什么？"}]
[{"en":"Fill out this customs declaration form.","zh":"填一下这张报关单。"}]
[{"en":"You can buy duty-free items at the airport.","zh":"你可以在机场买免税商品。"}]
[{"en":"The baggage claim area is downstairs.","zh":"行李提取处在一楼。"}]
[{"en":"I'll meet you in the arrival hall.","zh":"我会在到达大厅接你。"}]
[{"en":"I have a transit flight in Dubai.","zh":"我在迪拜中转。"}]
[{"en":"Your connecting flight is at gate 15.","zh":"你的转机航班在15号登机口。"}]
[{"en":"Wait in the departure lounge until boarding.","zh":"在候机厅等候登机。"}]
[{"en":"You can only take one carry-on bag.","zh":"你只能带一件随身行李。"}]
[{"en":"Your checked baggage is 23 kilograms.","zh":"你的托运行李是23公斤。"}]
[{"en":"Please go through the security check.","zh":"请通过安检。"}]
[{"en":"The immigration officer asked me a few questions.","zh":"入境官员问了我几个问题。"}]
[{"en":"What's your duration of stay in the UK?","zh":"你在英国停留多久？"}]
[{"en":"Do you have a return ticket?","zh":"你有回程机票吗？"}]
[{"en":"You need an entry permit to enter the country.","zh":"你需要入境许可才能入境。"}]
[{"en":"Make sure your travel documents are valid.","zh":"确保你的旅行证件有效。"}]
[{"en":"Fill in your landing card before arrival.","zh":"到达前填好入境卡。"}]
[{"en":"My suitcase was damaged during the flight.","zh":"我的行李箱在飞行中损坏了。"}]
[{"en":"Check at the lost and found for your bag.","zh":"去失物招领处找找你的包。"}]
[{"en":"Let me introduce myself.","zh":"让我自我介绍一下。"}]
[{"en":"My hometown is Shanghai.","zh":"我的家乡是上海。"}]
[{"en":"What's your major?","zh":"你学什么专业？"}]
[{"en":"I'm still getting used to the weather here.","zh":"我还在适应这里的天气。"}]
[{"en":"Do you want to hang out this weekend?","zh":"这周末想一起出去玩吗？"}]
[{"en":"My class schedule is quite busy on Mondays.","zh":"我周一的上课安排很满。"}]
[{"en":"This semester I'm taking four courses.","zh":"这学期我选了四门课。"}]
[{"en":"The campus is beautiful in autumn.","zh":"秋天的校园很美。"}]
[{"en":"My roommate is from South Korea.","zh":"我的室友来自韩国。"}]
[{"en":"I'm originally from China.","zh":"我来自中国。"}]
[{"en":"What spoken language do you use at home?","zh":"你在家里说什么语言？"}]
[{"en":"I experienced some culture shock at first.","zh":"一开始我经历了一些文化冲击。"}]
[{"en":"It took me a few weeks to adapt.","zh":"我花了几个星期才适应。"}]
[{"en":"We have similar personalities.","zh":"我们性格很相似。"}]
[{"en":"My hobbies include reading and hiking.","zh":"我的爱好包括阅读和徒步。"}]
[{"en":"I'm a freshman at the university.","zh":"我是大学一年级新生。"}]
[{"en":"We have a lot of common interests.","zh":"我们有很多共同兴趣。"}]
[{"en":"We share the kitchen and bathroom.","zh":"我们共用厨房和卫生间。"}]
[{"en":"I need some privacy sometimes.","zh":"我有时候需要一些隐私。"}]
[{"en":"It's important to be polite to your roommate.","zh":"对室友礼貌很重要。"}]
[{"en":"We had a nice conversation about our cultures.","zh":"我们聊了各自的文化，聊得很开心。"}]
